---
title: 'Let''s Go Astros, Let''s Go!'
date: '2015-10-08T23:23:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '6805283229459584335'
blogger_filename: '/2015/10/lets-go-astros-lets-go.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
---

<div class="mobile-photo">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/0919150937b-792627-a4ed10218747.jpg"><img alt="" border="0" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6196235904797043330" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/0919150937b-792627-ed4c47270dc8.jpg" /></a></div>
Astrros are playing their first game. Preston got the first hit of the game!!
